contents:
🦍 3D Printed King Kong Pro Gong Replacement Elevate the look of your King Kong Pro Pinball Machine with this precision-engineered, 3D-printed gong replacement. Designed for a perfect fit and crafted from high-quality, durable materials, this custom gong is the ideal upgrade for enthusiasts seeking optimal performance and aesthetics.
Product Features ⚡ Perfect Fit: A direct, precision-made replacement for the stock King Kong Pro pinball machine gong. 🛠️ Optimized Durability: Constructed from premium, resilient 3D-printed materials to ensure long-lasting performance under heavy gameplay. 🔧 Easy Installation: Designed for a simple, hassle-free swap, getting you back to the action quickly. All necessary materials/hardware are included. 🎨 Unique Aesthetic: Each piece is individually painted, offering a custom, high-quality look that enhances your machine’s theme. Please note: Minor artistic variations in the painting process may occur, making each gong unique.
title: King Kong Gong Replacement (Pro Model)

contents:
64x128 pixel dot matrix display (DMD) suitable for arcade machines and pinball conversions. Professional-grade display with vibrant output and reliable performance.
Built-in Display Functions Easily switch between multiple visual modes using flexible playback controls:
Marquee Mode: Scrolling text display for announcements or machine names. Clock Function: Displays the current time. VU Meter: Visual audio spectrum analyzer that reacts to sound (music or game audio). Game of Life: Runs Conway’s cellular automaton for a retro visual effect. Different Playback Controls: Comprehensive controls for managing display settings and content. Product Features Feature Detail Resolution 64x128 pixel LED display. Quality Professional-grade construction and components. Durability Durable build designed for long-term use in gameroom environments. Connectivity Web-interface for seamless control and configuration. Integration Full API support for advanced customization and integration into existing systems. Software Future-proof with new features delivered via firmware updates.
title: Dot Matrix Display 64x128

contents:
Bring the iconic Jack Rabbit Slim’s dance contest scene to life on your pinball machine! This Pulp Fiction topper features Vincent Vega and Mia Wallace on the backside of the glass, creating a stunning stereoscopic depth effect. The sound-reactive LED strip pulses to the music and game sounds, illuminating the artwork with dynamic lighting.
Product Features Iconic scene: Mia and Vincent at the Jack Rabbit Slim’s dance contest Hand-painted artwork on the backside of glass for stereoscopic depth effect Sound-reactive LED strip that responds to game audio Easy installation with dual power options: Connect directly to pinball main board using J109 Use standard USB 5V power adapter Perfect addition to any Pulp Fiction pinball machine Plug-and-play setup
title: Pulp Fiction Topper - Jack Rabbit Slim's Dance

contents:
Personalized flipper keychain with your very own text. Specify up to 10 characters for your very own personalized keychain. Use it for the key on your coin door or as a functional key for daily use.
Product Features Keyring included
title: Red black free text
